name: X1 Card
annual_fee_description: $0 annual fee (standard); X1+ package adds $75 annual fee with enhanced benefits

welcome_offer.requirement: Spend $5,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening (X1+ offer)

earning_rates.description: 3X points on every dollar if cardholder spends $12,000+ annually

features: No late fees (as of November 2025 update)
X1+ package ($75): includes 75,000 bonus points welcome offer, enhanced benefits, and priority support
